ops.title: cc-transcript: Documentation workflow races Release (PyPI) on every release push
ops.description: docs.yml and release-pypi.yml both trigger on push to main with no ordering; gd-build introspects the latest published PyPI wheel (compiled-ext fallback), so on a release push it reads the previous version's wheel and errors on any symbol newer than it (hit on the v14.4.0 push: `Configured reference item(s) not found in cc_transcript v14.4.0: Word` while the 14.2.0 wheel was still latest; same failure on the v14.3.0-era push). Fix: make Documentation wait on Release (PyPI) — `workflow_run: workflows: ["Release (PyPI)"]` trigger in docs.yml (dropping bare push), or a needs: gate if merged into one file. Separately verify why the 61b5f64 push's Release (PyPI) never ran (tag-trigger condition in release-pypi.yml). Immediate mitigation used 2026-07-19: `gh run rerun <id> --failed` after publish completes goes green.

ops.text: A release push (changelog+version commit then tag) produces a green Documentation run with no manual rerun
Non-release pushes to main still build and publish docs
